description_long: This is a metallic parcel box with a rugged, industrial appearance, featuring a brushed and scratched steel texture on all sides. The box is reinforced with riveted metal edges, giving it a robust and secure look. On one side, there is a black graphic of a stylized bird with outstretched wings, while the opposite side displays a black silhouette of a cat in a playful pose. The top surface is adorned with a circular green and black emblem, which includes some text and a star motif, adding a distinctive urban flair. The box appears solid and heavy, suitable for secure storage or transport in an urban environment. Its overall design suggests durability and a utilitarian function, with artistic elements that make it visually striking.
description: A rugged, metallic parcel box with riveted edges, scratched steel texture, and black animal graphics on the sides. The top features a green and black emblem, giving it an industrial yet artistic urban look.
description_view_0: This view shows the side with a black bird graphic and part of the top emblem visible.
description_view_1: This view displays a plain, scratched steel side with riveted edges and the top emblem partially visible.
description_view_2: This view shows another plain, scratched steel side with riveted edges and the top emblem partially visible.
description_view_3: This view features a black cat graphic on the side, with the top emblem partially visible.
